zh.lifeSummary: 當Eva de Whittington and Alveston於1108年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾廷頓時，她的父親Ranulphus de Whittington17歲，母親Maud de Peverel19歲。她於1139年與Fulk FitzWarin I在英國英格蘭史洛普爾廷頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1155年在她的家鄉享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eva de Whittington and Alveston于1108年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾廷頓时，她的父亲Ranulphus de Whittington17岁，母亲Maud de Peverel19岁。她于1139年与Fulk FitzWarin I在英国英格兰史洛普爾廷頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1155年在她的家乡享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: and
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Jasvir, Dalbir, Jagdish.  German Alois, Ewald, Gerda.
Indian (Punjab): Sikh name, probably from Punjabi məṇḍ ‘skill’. It is based on the name of a Jat clan.

variants.name: Mandt
meanings: German and Norwegian (of Danish origin): from a short form of the ancient Germanic personal names beginning with Mant-, e.g. Mantwic, formed with Old High German mandjan ‘rejoice’ as the first element.

variants.name: Mander
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Balwinder, Bikram.
English: occupational name from Middle English mander, maunder ‘basket-maker’, a derivative of Middle English mande, maunde ‘basket’. Compare Mand .
German: habitational name from any of the places called Mandern, in Hesse and the Rhineland.

nameMeanings.name: Alveston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from any of four places called Alvaston (Cheshire, Derbys) or Alveston (Gloucs, Warwicks).

nameMeanings.name: Eva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

nameMeanings.name: Whittington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of a large number of places called Whittington, for example in Gloucestershire, Worcestershire, Warwickshire, Shropshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Lancashire, and Northumberland. Most of these places are named with the Old English personal name Hwīta + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, meaning ‘Hwīta's settlement’ or ‘settlement associated with Hwīta’.

variants.name: Whittenton
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Whittington  .

en.lifeSummary: When Eva de Whittington and Alveston was born in 1108, in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ranulphus de Whittington, was 17 and her mother, Maud de Peverel, was 19. She married Fulk FitzWarin I in 1139, in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1155, in her hometown, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eva de Whittington and Alveston est née en 1108, à Whittington, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ranulphus de Whittington, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Maud de Peverel, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Fulk FitzWarin I en 1139, à Whittington, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1155, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eva de Whittington and Alveston 1108 in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ranulphus de Whittington 17 und ihre Mutter Maud de Peverel 19. Sie hat 1139 in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Fulk FitzWarin I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1155 im Alter von 47 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eva de Whittington and Alveston è nata il nel 1108 nel Whittington, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Ranulphus de Whittington, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Maud de Peverel, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Fulk FitzWarin I nel 1139, nel Whittington, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1155, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eva de Whittington and Alvestonが1108年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィッティントンで生まれた時，父Ranulphus de Whittingtonは17歳，母Maud de Peverelは19歳であった。1139年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィッティントンでFulk FitzWarin Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1155年に故郷で47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eva de Whittington and Alveston(이)가 1108년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 휘틴그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ranulphus de Whittington(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Peverel(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1139년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 휘틴그턴에서 Fulk FitzWarin I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1155년 그녀의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eva de Whittington and Alveston nasceu em 1108, em Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ranulphus de Whittington, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Peverel, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Fulk FitzWarin I em 1139, em Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1155, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eva de Whittington and Alveston родилась в 1108 г. в местности уиттингтон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ranulphus de Whittington было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Peverel, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Fulk FitzWarin I в 1139 г. в местности уиттингтон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1155 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eva de Whittington and Alveston nació en 1108, en Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ranulphus de Whittington, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Maud de Peverel, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Fulk FitzWarin I en 1139, en Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1155, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años.
